description: ORDR-Connect — Shadow Model A/B Harness: primary/shadow comparison outcomes and divergence distributions. Paired with PrometheusShadowSink (packages/decision-engine/src/prometheus-shadow-sink.ts).

panels.title: Comparison Outcomes (5m rate, by status)
panels.description: agreement (|div| <= 0.05) / divergence / error / missing_model. Error or missing_model spikes mean the shadow is not healthy — check before interpreting divergence numbers.

panels.title: Divergence Rate (per shadow, 5m)
panels.description: Fraction of non-error comparisons where the shadow diverged beyond the 0.05 agreement band. Lower = shadow tracks primary well; sustained high = candidate is behaviorally different.

panels.title: Divergence Distribution — P50 / P95 / P99
panels.description: |primaryScore - shadowScore| quantiles. Candidate is considered promotion-ready when P95 < 0.1 and P99 < 0.2 sustained across a representative workload window.

panels.title: Shadow Errors (5m rate)
panels.description: Shadow failures are isolated by ShadowScorer (never affect primary decisions) but still indicate a broken candidate bundle.

panels.title: Total Comparisons (24h)
panels.description: Volume sanity — promotion decisions should be made from a meaningfully large comparison corpus, not a handful of events.

title: ORDR-Connect — Shadow Models (A/B Harness)
